title: Random Stuff Reforge
description:
This mod expands structural options by adding more concrete variants and introduces a new, powerful tool with the sledgehammer.

Made using mcreator: https://mcreator.net.
body:
It introduces numerous concrete variants allowing players to create more detailed, modern, or industrial structures in all colors. Furthermore, the mod adds a powerful, new utility tool: the sledgehammer, designed to be the definitive implement for quick and effective structural demolition. 

Made using mcreator: https://mcreator.net
